name: Pecan-Praline Cookie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter or margarine in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add the brown sugar and beat until combined.
3. Beat in the egg yolk and vanilla until combined.
4. Beat in as much of the flour as possible using the mixer, then stir any remaining flour with a wooden spoon.
5. Spread the dough evenly in a lightly greased 12-inch pizza pan, slightly building up the edges.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Meanwhile, stir together sour cream, brown sugar, and vanilla in a small mixing bowl.
8. Immediately spread over the hot crust, leaving about 1/2 inch of space from the edge.
9. Arrange pecan halves around the edge of the crust and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
10. Allow to cool thoroughly on a wire rack; the topping will set as it cools.
11. Cut into wedges and serve when cooled. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 12 to 15 servings.
